business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial property ownership with warehouse, manufacturing, and office operations across Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Total Insured Value across 9 locations includes Building, Contents, and BI values

positives: Majority of locations are Non-Combustible or Masonry Non-Combustible construction
Mix of relatively modern construction (several post-2000 builds)
Low claim frequency over prior 4 years (only 1 claim in 2021 prior term shown)
Fire Resistive construction at Corporate Administrative Office
concerns: LOC-007 Toledo Industrial Park - Building 2 is not sprinklered
Older construction at Dayton Manufacturing Facility (1992) and Toledo Building 2 (1998)
Manufacturing occupancy at two locations presents higher hazard than warehouse
Two property claims in loss history with total incurred of $238,554
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2 property claims with $202,875 paid and $238,554 incurred; 1 claim in 2021, no claims in 2022-2024 policy years
